---
title: "simulating_experiment"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse)

```

```{r}
features = c("eyes", "buffness", "arms", "spots", "color")

df = expand.grid(rep(list(c(0, 1)), length(features)))

colnames(df) = features
```


```{r}
df <- df %>% 
  mutate(dangerous = ifelse((eyes == 1 & spots == 1), 1, 0), 
         nutricious = ifelse((arms == 1), 1, 0)) 

df_shuffled <- df[sample(nrow(df)), ]
```
